sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal.

Piel מִגֵּן to give, to deliver, Gen 14:20 with two acc. of pers. and thing, Pro 4:9 also like נָתַן, שּׂוּם to make any one any thing, Hos 11:8 comp. مَجَّاًنا, ܡܰܓܢܳ gratis, prop. given. (To this seems to answer Arabic مَكِنَ to be able; II. to give into one’s power, ב and ג being interchanged.)
